title: Hut 8 Commercializes First Phase of 1 GW Beacon Point AI Data Center Campus
text: Beacon Point AI Data Center Campus Commercialization. Hut 8 announced commercialization of first phase of Beacon Point campus in Nueces County, Texas. 352 MW IT capacity lease with 15-year term. $9.8 billion base-term contract value. Investment-grade tenant with 3% annual escalators. Three 5-year renewal options could push total value to $25.1 billion. Campus built on 525-acre site with 1 GW utility capacity potential.
